title: lotus rectus
intro: Lotus rectus, also known as Nelumbo nucifera, is a type of aquatic plant that grows in shallow waters and is native to parts of Asia and Australia. The medicinal properties of Lotus rectus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming or using Lotus rectus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and even help manage diabetes, due to its potential to regulate blood sugar levels. Lotus rectus is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and other ailments.
